overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a driving game (GTA V style) showing a vehicle crossing a large red suspension bridge resembling the Golden Gate Bridge on a clear sunny day. The player drives steadily forward as various vehicles pass in the opposite direction while suspension cables and bridge towers dominate the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge roadway with two-way traffic lanes

agents.ego_description: driving steadily forward in the right lane of the suspension bridge, approaching distant bridge towers

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck approaching in the opposite lane, visible ahead on the left

red vertical suspension cables running along the left side of the bridge deck
red vertical suspension cables running along the right side of the bridge deck
asphalt road surface with yellow lane dividing markings
metal safety barrier separating the roadway from oncoming traffic lanes
metal safety barrier on the right edge of the bridge
distinctive red curved street light pole on the left side of the bridge
distinctive red curved street light pole on the right side of the bridge
blue ocean water visible beyond the left bridge railing
blue ocean water visible beyond the right bridge railing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view driving onto a massive red suspension bridge under clear blue skies. The iconic bridge towers stand prominently in the distance while red suspension cables frame both sides of the roadway. The vehicle maintains a steady speed across the asphalt deck with ocean water visible on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge roadway with two-way traffic lanes

events.description: black pickup truck passes by in the opposite lane on the left side
white van visible ahead driving in the same lane, moving slower than ego vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward across the bridge, passing the black truck and approaching slower traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck passing by quickly in the opposite lane
white van driving ahead in the same lane at slower speed

entered.detail: new red street light pole coming into view ahead on the left
new red street light pole coming into view ahead on the right

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues across the bridge as a black pickup truck passes in the opposite direction. The street light poles that were nearby in the previous segment have now passed behind, replaced by new poles ahead. A white van is visible driving ahead in the same lane, and the bridge towers remain prominent in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge roadway with two-way traffic lanes

events.description: large white semi truck with trailer passes by in the opposite lane on the left
yellow car passes by in the opposite lane on the left

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed across the bridge, passing large commercial truck and smaller vehicles

notable_agents.action: large white semi truck with trailer passing by in the opposite lane
yellow car passing by quickly in the opposite lane

entered.detail: new red street light pole coming into view ahead on the left
new red street light pole coming into view ahead on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued driving across the bridge as a large white semi-truck passes in the opposite lane, followed later by a yellow car. The repetitive pattern of red street lights continues to pass by as the vehicle progresses toward the distant bridge towers. The ocean remains visible on both sides with clear skies overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive across a massive red suspension bridge under a clear blue sky. It begins with the vehicle entering the bridge, where iconic red towers loom in the distance and suspension cables frame the asphalt roadway above the ocean. As the vehicle maintains a steady speed, the perspective shifts past a series of street light poles while a black pickup truck passes in the opposite direction and a white van leads the way ahead. The scene then progresses further across the deck, with the repetitive pattern of red lights flashing by as a large white semi-truck and a yellow car stream past in the oncoming lane. Finally, the camera continues its forward momentum, keeping the distant bridge towers centered as the vast ocean remains visible on both sides.
